title: i18n System
description: Comprehensive guide to internationalization architecture. Includes automatic key typing, translation completeness checks, and dynamic resource loading.
benefit_text: Total type safety — the project will not compile if a key is missing or translation structures differ across languages.

infra_key.title: i18nKey Wrapper
infra_key.description: Identity function for typing string keys. Provides IDE autocompletion for a specific Namespace.

infra_types.title: Type Magic
infra_types.description: Recursive JSON object traversal via <0>TNestedKeyOf</0> to generate dot-notated key paths.

config_hub.title: Resource Registry
config_hub.description: Importing master JSON files and creating the <0>TResources</0> master type in <0>i18n.config.ts</0>.

config_blocks.title: Translation Blocks
config_blocks.description: Configuring physical file locations and dynamic chunk loading in <0>i18n.blocks.ts</0>.

init_core.title: i18next Initialization
init_core.description: Binding plugins and configuration into a single library instance in <0>i18n.init.ts</0>.

init_checker.title: Consistency Control
init_checker.description: Static check in <0>i18n.checker.ts</0>. Guarantees that all languages have an identical key structure.

usage.title: UI Usage
usage.description: Parameterized <0>useTranslation</0> hook and the <0>Trans</0> component for working with dynamic content.

switching.title: Language Switching
switching.description: The <0>changeLanguage</0> utility for synchronous library state and <0>localStorage</0> updates.

config.label: Configuration:
config.text: All settings are centralized in <0>shared/config/i18n/</0>. Each aspect (types, initialization, blocks) is separated into its own file.

locales.label: Translation Files:
locales.text: Located in <0>public/locales/[lng]/</0>. Use subfolders to group namespaces (e.g., <0>booking/order.json</0>).
